reach_why: Extends familiar selection-bias critiques to AI explanation pipelines, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links judge bias, candidate-pool design, and pretrained priors into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying pool composition, judge criteria, and pretraining dependence; compare overlooked explanations and performance.
explanation: It argues the evaluation pipeline may systematically suppress genuinely alien but better explanations.
